name: PHP
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R $(whoami) . && sudo sed -i "s/xdebug.start_with_request = yes/xdebug.start_with_request = trigger\nxdebug.client_host = host.docker.internal/" /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/xdebug.ini && sudo docker-php-ext-install iconv && composer install --no-interaction && composer dump-autoload --optimize
